mapper.sql: usage_id AS usageId, order_id AS orderId, member_coupon_id AS memberCouponId, coupon_id AS couponId, partner_id AS partnerId, place_id AS placeId, discount_amount AS discountAmount, platform_discount_amount AS platformDiscountAmount, partner_discount_amount AS partnerDiscountAmount, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt, cancelled_at AS cancelledAt, cancel_reason AS cancelReason, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.insert:
SELECT coupon_usage_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO coupon_usage ( usage_id, order_id, member_coupon_id, coupon_id, partner_id, place_id, discount_amount, platform_discount_amount, partner_discount_amount, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{usageId}, #{orderId}, #{memberCouponId}, #{couponId}, #{partnerId}, #{placeId}, #{discountAmount}, #{platformDiscountAmount}, #{partnerDiscountAmount}, #{status}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_usage SET status = #{status}, cancelled_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'CANCELLED' THEN SYSDATE ELSE cancelled_at END, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE usage_id = #{usageId}
